name: 14 Carrots Cake Dream
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift all dry ingredients together.
2. Add sugar and oil to flour mixture.
3. Add eggs, pineapple, nuts, and carrots; mix well.
4. Bake in bundt pan (or large cake pan) at 350 degrees for 35 to 40 minutes.
5. Cool a few minutes in the pan, then turn out on wire racks.
